title: ProviderWebUIDashboardState
description: Schema for the combined WebUI dashboard state projection. Aggregates provider pool status, active worker assignments, queue depth, and resource pressure into a single read-model for the dashboard. See docs/ai-native/provider-webui-dashboard-state-schema.md for field-level documentation.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this projection was last written.

providers.description: Per-provider status entries. Empty when no providers are registered.

global.description: Aggregate pool metrics across all providers.

workers.description: Active worker assignments. Empty when no workers are running.

queue.description: Pending dispatch queue depth with blocked-reason breakdown.

pressure.description: Resource pressure indicators for the dashboard gauge.

id.description: Provider identifier. Logical id only — never exposes the underlying secret.

status.description: Current provider status. available = has capacity, exhausted = quota/rate limit hit, disabled = auth failure or manual disable.

currentConcurrency.description: Number of workers currently assigned to this provider.

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent workers allowed on this provider.

cooldownExpiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the exhaustion cooldown ends. Null when not in cooldown.

lastFailureClass.description: Classification of the most recent failure. Null when no failures recorded.

totalActiveWorkers.description: Sum of workers across all providers.

issue.description: GitHub issue number this worker is processing.

branch.description: Git branch or worktree the worker is operating on.

conflictGroup.description: Conflict group identifier from the task contract.

startedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the worker was dispatched.

status.description: Worker lifecycle status. running = actively executing, cooling-down = provider exhausted mid-task, draining = task complete, tearing down.

pendingTasks.description: Total tasks waiting to be dispatched.

blockedByExhaustion.description: Tasks blocked because all providers are exhausted.

blockedByConflict.description: Tasks blocked by active-worker conflict group overlap.

blockedByCapacity.description: Tasks blocked because global max workers has been reached.

level.description: Aggregate pressure level. normal = utilization < 60% and no exhaustion, elevated = utilization >= 60% or any provider exhausted, critical = utilization >= 90% or all providers exhausted/disabled.

nearestCooldownExpiry.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the earliest upcoming cooldown end. Null when no provider is cooling down.
